system: Canonical UI — un-branded, token-driven web components
law: The ONLY legal visual surface is the --ui-sys-* token layer.
Assemble screens from the real components below; never reimplement one in markup/CSS.
A component reads only --ui-sys-* tokens. No component stylesheet, no utility classes, no inline color/size.
If a need isn't covered by a component or expressible via a token, that is a gap to add to this manifest — not a one-off hack.

coverage.note: Parity with MD3's web surface (native) plus the blanks MD3 left (gapFill). All entries below are status:built.

button.summary: Primary action control; filled/tonal/outlined/text variants, state layer, focus ring, form-associated.

icon-button.summary: Circular icon button; standard/filled/tonal/outlined variants, optional selected toggle (aria-pressed).

fab.summary: Floating action button; small/medium/large sizes, primary/surface variants, extended via label, elevation-3.

text-field.summary: Outlined text input; floating label, leading/trailing slots, error state, supporting text, form-associated.

radio.summary: Radio grouped by name; selecting unchecks siblings; arrow-key group navigation; form-associated.

switch.summary: Toggle switch; animated pill track + handle via track/handle tokens; form-associated.

slider.summary: Horizontal range slider; filled track + draggable handle; pointer + keyboard (arrows/Home/End); form-associated.

select.summary: Outlined dropdown for short fixed sets; paired with ui-option; token-styled popup; combobox/listbox ARIA.

menu.summary: Action menu anchored to a trigger by id; paired with ui-menu-item (leading icon, disabled); full keyboard nav.

chip.summary: Chip variants assist/filter/input/suggestion; pill shape; filter toggles primary-container; input removable; paired with ui-chip-set.

list.summary: Vertical list; ui-list-item with leading/supporting/trailing slots and interactive (button-like) mode.

tabs.summary: Tab bar with animated active indicator; paired with ui-tab; arrow-key nav; emits change with index.

divider.summary: Thin separator; horizontal/vertical, optional inset; role=separator.

dialog.summary: Modal dialog; scrim, animated card, focus trap, Esc dismiss; headline/body/actions slots; show()/close().

tooltip.summary: Floating label on hover/focus; wraps a child or targets an anchor by id; aria-describedby wiring.

snackbar.summary: Transient bottom-center message; optional action slot; auto-dismiss timeout; role=status live region; show().

progress.summary: Determinate + indeterminate progress; linear bar and circular SVG; role=progressbar.

autocomplete.summary: Typeahead combobox; outlined field + filtered popup listbox; substring highlight; full keyboard nav. options set via property.

data-table.summary: Tokened semantic data grid (MD3 has none); sticky header, sortable columns, optional checkbox selection, comfortable/compact density. columns+data set via properties.

chart.summary: Inline-SVG chart (MD3 has none); bar/line/area; grid + axis labels; re-skins via computed tokens. data set via property or values attr.

app-bar.summary: Top app bar (dropped from MD3 web); leading/title/trailing slots; flat/elevated variant; role=banner.

nav-rail.summary: Vertical desktop side rail (dropped from MD3 web); ui-nav-item with pill active indicator; emits navigate.

nav-drawer.summary: Slide-in nav drawer (dropped from MD3 web); modal adds scrim+elevation-3+Esc; toggle()/close().

sheet.summary: Mobile bottom sheet (MD3 web has none); drag-handle, scrim, swipe-down/Esc/scrim-tap close; show()/close().

bottom-bar.summary: Mobile bottom navigation (MD3 web has none); ui-bottom-item with pill active indicator; emits navigate.

date-picker.summary: Calendar date picker (dropped from MD3 web); outlined trigger + month popup; grid keyboard nav; emits change.

stakeholder-table.summary: The Stakeholdr sheet. Frozen sticky #/edit/Stakeholder/Organization columns + scrollable Category/Type/Region/Priority/x/y/Relationship/Status; sortable headers (aria-sort); toolbar with search + filter/sort/category/site + positive/winnable/negative band chips; footer with count, avg x/y, Export CSV. Priority pills, toned coord cells, relationship zone pills (zone tokens), first-row zone tint. .data overrides sample seed.

stakeholder-map.summary: The Stakeholdr map — heat/scatter combo. 4x6 relationship-zone heatmap (14 zones via zone tokens) with stakeholders scatter-plotted by (x,y) [left=((x+10)/20), top=((10-y)/20)], zone labels + per-cell counts, axis legend, and a strategy detail panel (status pill, coords, strategy title+action, category). statusFor(x,y) lookup. .data overrides sample seed.
